title: Senior Radiologist at Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises:
Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
